_comment: Starter dashboard skeleton for an onboarded source. Deploy with sdl_put_file to /dashboards/<PREFIX> Overview. Replace {{TOKENS}} with the source's normalised OCSF fields discovered in Step 0/1. Keep number panels terminated with | limit 1. Use stacked_bar/line (never area) for query-driven time series, and match the timebucket to the duration (24h:10m, 7d:1h, 30d:1d). Project enriched device_*/user_* fields so panels carry asset context. Remove panels the source does not populate; add source-specific panels (URL category, IDS signature, geo) as needed.
description: {{DATASOURCE_NAME}} onboarding overview. Operational view of the {{DATASOURCE_NAME}} source after OCSF normalisation and asset enrichment.

graphs.markdown:
## {{DATASOURCE_NAME}} Overview
Normalised and asset-enriched view of the **{{DATASOURCE_NAME}}** source (`dataSource.name='{{DATASOURCE_NAME}}'`). Default window: last 24h. Use the time picker to widen.

graphs.title: Event Volume Over Time
graphs.query: dataSource.name='{{DATASOURCE_NAME}}' | group events=count() by timestamp=timebucket('10m'), {{ACTION_FIELD}} | sort timestamp

graphs.title: Action Breakdown
graphs.query: dataSource.name='{{DATASOURCE_NAME}}' {{ACTION_FIELD}}=* | group events=count() by {{ACTION_FIELD}} | sort -events | limit 10

graphs.title: Top Source Talkers (with device context)
graphs.query: dataSource.name='{{DATASOURCE_NAME}}' {{IP_SRC_FIELD}}=* | group events=count() by {{IP_SRC_FIELD}}, device_lastuser, device_criticality | sort -events | limit 25

graphs.title: Top Users (enriched)
graphs.query: dataSource.name='{{DATASOURCE_NAME}}' {{USER_FIELD}}=* | group events=count() by {{USER_FIELD}}, user_principal, user_privileged, user_criticality | sort -events | limit 25

graphs.title: Top Destinations
graphs.query: dataSource.name='{{DATASOURCE_NAME}}' {{IP_DST_FIELD}}=* | group events=count() by {{IP_DST_FIELD}}, {{PORT_FIELD}} | sort -events | limit 25
